# Drew Belczak — Freelance Web Designer

## Identity

Name: Drew Belczak
Role: Freelance Web Designer
Location: Buffalo, NY
Website: https://drew.belczak.net
Email: belczakdrew@gmail.com

## What I Do

I design and build fast, modern, conversion-focused websites for small and local businesses. Every site is custom-coded from scratch — no templates, no page builders. I focus on clean design, mobile performance, and helping clients attract more customers online.

## Services

- Custom website design (hand-coded HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
- Landing page design for local businesses
- Portfolio and showcase sites
- Mobile-responsive builds for all screen sizes
- Scroll animations and interactive UI effects
- SEO-ready site structure

## Skills

- HTML & CSS
- JavaScript
- UI/UX design
- Responsive design
- Typography and color theory
- Scroll-driven animations (GSAP)
- Performance optimization
- SEO basics

## Projects / Demo Work

Real demos built to showcase range across industries:

- Noir Bistro — Upscale restaurant site (dark, elegant, French cuisine)
- Nexus Dynamics — AI workstation product site (dark, editorial)
- APEX CrossFit — Gym and fitness site (bold, high-energy)
- Sterling & Associates — Law firm site (corporate, navy/gold)

All demos are live at https://drew.belczak.net under the work section.
